# Payload.IsValidCursor method

Returns `true` when *node* is a valid `Cursor` (§3.7): an opaque JSON string. An empty string is permitted — the spec does not prohibit it, and a receiver MUST NOT parse or infer structure from a cursor regardless of its content. (R-3.7-d)

```csharp
public static bool IsValidCursor(JsonNode? node)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| node | The candidate cursor node. |

## Return Value

`true` when the node is a string.
